title: Navigational Warning Reception
description: Receive a SECURITE navigational warning broadcast and acknowledge it correctly.
task: Listen to the SECURITE broadcast from RCC Haifa on Channel 16. Acknowledge that you have received the navigational warning.
stationPrompt:
You have just broadcast a SECURITE about an unlit buoy in position 50 degrees 10 minutes North, 001 degrees 25 minutes West. The student vessel must acknowledge.

NAME REPETITION RULES (abbreviated format — used for ALL station responses):
- Called vessel name: 1 time.
- Your station name after THIS IS: 2 times.
- Exception: SECURITE broadcast uses ALL STATIONS 3 times and station name 3 times.

Turn 1 — Student acknowledges receipt of the SECURITE.
Your reply: <vessel name>, THIS IS RCC HAIFA RCC HAIFA, ROGER, OUT.

If the student asks you to repeat the warning:
SECURITE SECURITE SECURITE, ALL STATIONS ALL STATIONS ALL STATIONS, THIS IS RCC HAIFA RCC HAIFA RCC HAIFA, NAVIGATIONAL WARNING, UNLIT BUOY IN POSITION FIVE ZERO DEGREES ONE ZERO MINUTES NORTH ZERO ZERO ONE DEGREES TWO FIVE MINUTES WEST, MARINERS ARE ADVISED TO NAVIGATE WITH CAUTION, OUT.

If the student's call is unclear:
STATION CALLING RCC HAIFA, SAY AGAIN, OVER.

Do not add any words beyond the formats above.
scriptReference: {{stationName}}, THIS IS {{vesselName}}, RECEIVED YOUR SECURITE, OVER

scriptedResponses.speaker: COAST_STATION
scriptedResponses.text: SECURITE SECURITE SECURITE. ALL STATIONS ALL STATIONS ALL STATIONS. THIS IS RCC HAIFA. NAVIGATIONAL WARNING. UNLIT BUOY IN POSITION FIVE ZERO DEGREES ONE ZERO MINUTES NORTH, ZERO ZERO ONE DEGREES TWO FIVE MINUTES WEST. MARINERS ARE ADVISED TO NAVIGATE WITH CAUTION. OUT.

scriptedResponses.speaker: COAST_STATION
scriptedResponses.text: BLUE DUCK, THIS IS RCC HAIFA RCC HAIFA, ROGER, OUT.

hints: Listen carefully to the SECURITE broadcast
Note the nature and position of the warning
Acknowledge by calling the station and confirming receipt
